name: Black-Eyed Peas with Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the peas and water in a covered pot and bring to a boil.
2. Simmer for 2 minutes, then turn off the heat and let steep for 1 hour.
3. Heat oil in a pan and when hot, add cumin seeds and cinnamon stick. Let sizzle for a few seconds.
4. Add onions and garlic and stir-fry until the onions start to turn brown at the edges.
5. Add mushrooms and stir-fry until they begin to wilt.
6. Add tomatoes, coriander, cumin, turmeric, and cayenne. Stir and cook for 1 minute.
7. Cover and turn the heat to low, then cook for 10 minutes.
8. Turn off the heat. Bring the peas back to a boil, simmer for 20 to 30 minutes.
9. Add the cooked mushrooms and spices along with the remaining ingredients.
10. Simmer on low heat for an additional 30 minutes, stirring occasionally.
11. Remove the cinnamon stick before serving.
